prompt:
Goal: Create a cinematic vertical anime/fantasy collectible poster for The Champion, styled like a nostalgic monster-partner adventure magazine cover, blending realistic lighting with high-detail creature design.

Canvas: Tall portrait poster, 2:3 aspect ratio, warm beige and gold color grading, dusty sunlit atmosphere, dramatic backlight, floating digital pixel fragments, subtle paper-grain texture, premium key visual composition.

Main subject: A young woman hero stands in the center foreground, running forward and reaching one hand toward the viewer. Her face is intentionally obscured by a plain medium-brown rectangular censor block. She has dark brown hair in a loose low bun, soft flyaway strands, a delicate necklace, a cream floral summer dress, and a loose white cardigan. In her outstretched hand she holds a glowing round digital device with a bright blue circular core and metallic gold casing.

Creature count: Include exactly 5 monster companions. 1) A huge crystalline white-and-gold dragon fills the upper background, arcing behind the hero, with jagged crystal armor, long golden horns, open roaring mouth, sharp teeth, and one glowing electric-blue eye. 2) A tiny orange winged mascot sits near the hero’s raised hand, cute face, blue eyes, small bat-like wings, and cheerful expression. 3) A blue-gray horned wolf/reptile creature crouches on the lower left behind the hero, spiky fur scales, one striped horn, open snarling mouth, collar, and gem pendant. 4) An orange dinosaur-like creature occupies the bottom left foreground, big green eye, open happy roaring mouth, rounded snout, collar, and blue gem pendant. 5) A white cat-rabbit creature on the lower right, blue eyes, purple-tipped ear tufts, fluffy body, collar, gem pendant, and alert pose.

Layout and typography: Place large bold black sans-serif title text in the upper left reading The Champion. Above it, add small text reading “DIGIMON CHAMPION EDITION” with tiny circular icons. Under the title, add Japanese subtitle text: 「選ばれし絆、未来へ。」 and a smaller Japanese line beneath it. Add left-side editorial markings: “01”, “DIGITAL WORLD CHAMPION”, a vertical barcode, and a small globe icon. Add right-side markings: a circular champion emblem, “DIGITAL WORLD CHAMPION”, “No.2025”, vertical Japanese text, and thin measurement-line graphics. Add bottom-left collectible card panel with “LEGEND” and Japanese text 「伝説のチャンピオン」. Add bottom-right black label panel with “CHAMPION”, “The Chosen One”, a signature scribble, and barcode-like decoration.

Visual style: Ultra-detailed anime-realism, cinematic fantasy poster, high-end game promotional art, glossy creature eyes, crystalline scales, warm dust particles, volumetric sunlight, shallow depth of field, dynamic diagonal composition, heroic nostalgic adventure mood.

Constraints: Keep the composition crowded but readable, use exactly the 5 listed creatures, preserve the obscured face block, avoid extra characters, avoid logos or watermarks beyond the designed fictional poster text.
